summary: Iteration 23: Comprehensive testing of NEW Autonomous SEO Engine features. Backend: 19/20 tests passed (95%), 1 skipped. All SEO Engine APIs working: sitemap.xml (3746+ articles), rss.xml (50 items), robots.txt, server-rendered article pages with JSON-LD/OG/Twitter Cards, IndexNow verification key, SEO stats endpoint. Frontend: All 4 agent tabs visible, SEO Infra tab shows 7/7 SEO components all green, SEO Meta Coverage progress bar visible (1.2% coverage). Celery worker + beat + Redis all running.

passed_tests: GET /sitemap.xml returns valid XML with 3746+ article URLs
Sitemap has main pages (home, epaper, agents)
GET /rss.xml returns valid RSS XML with ~50 items
RSS feed has proper channel metadata (title: Kaizer News)
GET /robots.txt returns valid text with Allow/Disallow rules
GET /api/seo-engine/article/{id} returns HTML with OG tags, Twitter Cards, JSON-LD
POST /api/seo-engine/generate-meta triggers background SEO meta generation
GET /api/agents/seo/latest returns report with trending keywords
Frontend index.html has proper OG tags
Frontend index.html has RSS feed link
Celery worker running (supervisorctl status shows RUNNING)
skipped_tests: test_article_page_has_json_ld - Skipped when no articles available for secondary test

seo_engine.sitemap_xml: Valid XML with 3746 articles indexed, includes main pages and category pages
seo_engine.rss_xml: Valid RSS 2.0 feed with 50 recent articles, Google News compatible
seo_engine.robots_txt: Proper crawler directives, includes sitemap reference
seo_engine.server_rendered_pages: Full HTML with title, OG tags, Twitter Cards, JSON-LD NewsArticle schema

celery_redis.beat_schedule: scrape-all-sources (30min), morning-report (6am), evening-report (6pm), seo-meta-backfill (1hr), static-seo-regenerate (30min), perf-report-hourly

frontend_seo_infra_tab.location: /agents > Social Media Expert > SEO Infra tab
components_visible: IndexNow (Auto-ping Bing & Yandex on new articles)
JSON-LD (NewsArticle schema on every article page)

critical_code_review_comments: seo_engine.py: Well-structured with sitemap/RSS generation, proper async DB queries, JSON-LD schema implementation
celery_app.py: Clean Celery config with Redis broker, comprehensive beat schedule for automated tasks
tasks.py: Good task organization with proper async-to-sync helpers via run_async()
AgentsDashboard.jsx: SEO Infra tab implementation shows all 7 components with green status indicators
index.html: Proper SEO meta tags including OG, Twitter Cards, RSS link, canonical URL
seed_data_creation: None needed - Static SEO files auto-generated from existing news articles
context_for_next_testing_agent: All NEW Autonomous SEO Engine features are fully implemented and working: sitemap.xml with 3746+ articles, rss.xml with 50 recent articles, robots.txt, server-rendered article pages with full SEO tags (OG, Twitter Cards, JSON-LD), IndexNow integration, SEO meta auto-generation. Celery + Redis unified task queue running with scheduled tasks for scraping (30min), SEO meta backfill (1hr), static file regeneration (30min). Frontend SEO Infra tab shows all 7 components with green status. Previous SEO Agent and Tech Agent features still working (verified).
